author: lOrm
content: Fixed. HttpTransport::new now calls crate::web::validate_url at construction (same SSRF guard as web_fetch) and returns Result<Self, McpError>. McpManager::connect_http propagates the validation error. Rejects file://, data:, ftp:, loopback (127.0.0.0/8, ::1, localhost), RFC 1918, link-local (169.254.169.254), cloud-metadata hostnames, and unresolvable hosts. A test-only __test_new_unchecked is exposed via #[doc(hidden)] so loopback-binding tests can still operate. Tests: fix677_file_scheme_rejected, fix677_loopback_rejected, fix677_cloud_metadata_ip_rejected, fix677_valid_public_https_accepted, fix677_connect_http_propagates_ssrf_rejection. 48 mcp tests pass, clippy clean.
